examples: The criticisms will not stop people flocking to see the film.
The glitterati of Hollywood are flocking to Janet Vaughan's nail salon.
A summer weekend sends people flocking to the seaside-like setting of Dino Beach, a suburban water park.
Shoppers were flocking to the department stores with the bright windows and expensive merchandise.
Buyers are flocking to small SUVs and crossovers for both their practical natures and sporty demeanors.
